case_title: ASN FOX PLAZA LLC VS. JAMES MELTON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASN FOX PLAZA LLC

SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA. 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )

REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $20.00 RE 31518 FOR TRANSACTION W1807105O010 (OVERPAYMENT), PAYABLE TO AOC OPERATIONS ACCOUNT, WARRANT #00656423, DATED JUL-27-2010
